title: BITS Pilani is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: BITS Pilani is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BITS Pilani. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!
